title: Negasonic Teenage Warhead
content:
{{MarvelLegacy|Fox|[[Earth-10005]]|4=Characters|6=''Deadpool'' or ''Deadpool 2''}} {{Character |image = Negasonic Teenage Warhead.png |real name = {{Conjecture|Eloise Olivia Phimister}} |alias = {{Alias |primary = {{Conjecture|Ellie Phimister}}This character's name comes from [https://twitter.com/deadpoolmovie/status/979070106826412032 Deadpool Movie on Twitter - March 28, 2018]. |codenames = Negasonic Teenage Warhead{{Ref|DW}}}} |species = [[Mutant]] |citizenship = {{Citizenship|USA}} |gender = Female |affiliation = {{Affiliation|X2E10005}} |movie = ''[[Deadpool & Wolverine]]'' |actor = [[Brianna Hildebrand]] |status = Alive}} {{Quote|Nice fake-o'clock shadow.|Ellie Phimister to [[Wade Wilson]]|Deadpool & Wolverine}} '''{{Conjecture|Eloise Olivia "Ellie" Phimister}}''' is a member of the [[X-Men/Earth-10005|X-Men]] known as '''Negasonic Teenage Warhead'''. ==Biography== {{MD|Eloise Phimister (Earth-10005 Revised)||1}} ===Joining the X-Men=== Ellie Phimister was born a [[mutant]] with the ability to generate explosions from her body, leading her to joining the [[X-Men/Earth-10005|X-Men]], going by the codename Negasonic Teenage Warhead. Along with her mentor [[Colossus]], Negasonic assisted [[Deadpool]] in rescuing his [[Vanessa Carlysle|girlfriend]]. A few years later, Negasonic began a romantic relationship with fellow X-Men member [[Yukio]].{{Ref|DW}} ===Wade Wilson's Birthday=== {{Quote|It's a summer balayage from the [[France|French]]. It's meant to mimic the natural highlights of the [[Sun]]."
"It's a toupée.|[[Wade Wilson]] and Ellie Phimister|Deadpool & Wolverine}} In [[2020s/Earth-10005#2024|2024]], Negasonic was invited to [[Wade Wilson]]'s surprise birthday party at his [[Wade Wilson's Apartment|apartment]], along with [[Yukio]] and [[Colossus]], as well as the rest of Wilson's friends. After surprising Wilson when he returned home, all the guests mingled with each other. Negasonic commented on Wilson's obvious toupée, but he tried to claim it was a balayage. All the guests listened to Wilson make a speech about how grateful he was to have them in his life. A few days later, they all got together again for dinner, and were joined by [[Logan]] and [[Laura]].{{Ref|DW}} ==Powers== *'''Mutant Physiology''': Negasonic was born with the mutant gene, granting her powers beyond human capability. **'''Concussive Force Generation''': Due to her mutant gene, Negasonic has the power to generate concussive forces of pure energy. These blasts are powerful enough to send people flying back several feet or upwards into the air along with having the ability to push larger objects such as vehicles. The force that the blasts can push these objects is enough to crush an entire person. ***'''Force Field Generation''': Negasonic had the power to use her concussive blasts to form a sort of shield around herself, protecting her from attacks such as fire. ==Equipment== ''To be added'' {{Expand}} ==Facilities== ''To be added'' {{Expand}} ==Relationships== ===Allies=== *[[X-Men/Earth-10005|X-Men]] - Teammates and Friends **[[Colossus|Piotr Rasputin/Colossus]] **[[Yukio]] - Girlfriend *[[Deadpool|Wade Wilson/Deadpool]] - Friend *[[Vanessa Carlysle]] *[[Dopinder]] *[[Blind Al]] *[[Peter Wisdom]] *[[Shatterstar|Rusty/Shatterstar]] *[[Buck]] *[[Wolverine|Logan/Wolverine]] *[[X-23|X-23/Laura]] *[[Dogpool|Mary Puppins/Dogpool]] ==Trivia== *In the comics, Ellie Phimister was a student of [[w:c:marvel:Emma Frost|Emma Frost]], who died during [[Cassandra Nova]]'s attack on [[w:c:marvel:Genosha|Genosha]]. She was later resurrected and joined [[Deadpool]]'s Mercs for Money. **Negasonic Teenage Warhead was originally a psychic mutant with precognition abilities, but her powers were changed after the character's introduction in ''{{WPS|Deadpool (film)|Deadpool}}''. *In {{WPS|20th Century Fox}}'s {{WPS|X-Men (film series)|''X-Men'' film series}}, Negasonic Teenage Warhead is an [[X-Men/Earth-10005|X-Man]] and girlfriend of [[Yukio]] who often shadowed [[Colossus]] on his missions to teach [[Deadpool]] how to be a hero. ==Behind the Scenes== *Negasonic Teenage Warhead in the [[Marvel Cinematic Universe]] continues the live-action incarnation of the character from {{WPS|20th Century Fox}}'s {{WPS|X-Men (film series)|''X-Men'' film series}}, who was portrayed by [[Brianna Hildebrand]]. *During the production of ''{{WPS|Deadpool (film)|Deadpool}}'', [[Tim Miller]] requested [[Kevin Feige]]'s permission to alter Negasonic Teenage Warhead's powers for the movie, as they wanted to use the name for essentially a new character with new powers. [[Marvel Studios]] then transferred the cinematic rights to Negasonic Teenage Warhead to {{WPS|20th Century Fox}} in exchange for Fox giving them the cinematic rights for [[Ego the Living Planet]], who [[James Gunn]] wanted to use in ''[[Guardians of the Galaxy Vol. 2]]''.[http://theplaylist.net/ryan-reynolds-paul-wernick-talk-deadpool-sequel-surprising-link-guardians-2-20161114/ Ryan Reynolds And Paul Wernick Talk ‘Deadpool’ Sequel And The Surprising Link To ‘Guardians 2’] ==References== {{Gallery|Negasonic Teenage Warhead/Gallery}} {{Reflist}} ==External Links== *{{Marvel}} *{{Marvel|Eloise Phimister (Earth-10005 Revised)}} *{{WP}} [[Category:Characters]] [[Category:Deadpool & Wolverine Characters]] [[Category:Mutants]] [[Category:Females]] [[Category:Black Hair]] [[Category:Brown Eyes]] [[Category:X-Men Members/Earth-10005]] [[Category:LGBTQIA+ Characters]]
